title: AudioPAC: Open-source software for Central Auditory Processing assessment and speech audiometry
description:
AudioPAC is a cross-platform desktop application (Linux/Windows) built with Tauri v2 for clinical assessment of Central Auditory Processing Disorder (CAPD) and speech audiometry. It provides a test engine, recorder and calibration system. Tests, stimulus lists and clinical content are distributed as installable packages from the audiopac-assets repository. UI and clinical content are primarily in Spanish.

---

AudioPAC es una aplicación multiplataforma (Linux/Windows) construida con Tauri v2 para evaluación clínica del Procesamiento Auditivo Central (PAC) y logoaudiometría. Incluye motor de tests, grabador y sistema de calibración. Los tests, listas de estímulos y contenido clínico se distribuyen como paquetes instalables desde el repositorio audiopac-assets.
